task_completion.description: Verify that Wei Chen's T4 income has been entered into StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax 2024 interface showing a T4 entry screen with the taxpayer name 'Wei Chen' and employment income fields filled out.

task_completion.description: Verify that RRSP contributions have been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the RRSP entry screen or Schedule 7 in StudioTax 2024 showing contribution amounts entered.

task_completion.description: Verify the foreign dividend income is entered and correctly converted to CAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T2209 form, foreign income worksheet, or foreign slip entry in StudioTax showing a foreign dividend income amount of exactly $16,848.

task_completion.description: Verify the foreign tax paid is entered and correctly converted to CAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T2209 form or foreign slip entry in StudioTax showing a foreign non-business tax paid amount of exactly $2,527.

task_completion.description: Verify the T1135 Foreign Income Verification Statement is completed using the Detailed Reporting method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T1135 form in StudioTax. The 'Detailed reporting method' section must be used/checked, and a cost amount of $350,000 should be visible in the asset details.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box, a file explorer window, or the StudioTax title bar confirming the file is saved as 'wei_chen.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the genuine StudioTax 2024 application window being used to input data, rather than a text editor, terminal, or script modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply type the expected final answers into a notepad or terminal to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values ($16,848, $2,527, $350,000) must be visible inside the specific form fields of the StudioTax application (e.g., T2209, T1135).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent saved the file through the application rather than just renaming a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax save dialog or confirmation that the application itself generated the 'wei_chen.24t' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Wei Chen. Province: BC. Expected CAD foreign dividend income: $16,848. Expected CAD foreign tax paid: $2,527. Expected T1135 cost: $350,000. The output file must be saved as 'wei_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
